name: Small World - Stories of Middleclass
original_name: Sano Sansar - Stories of Middleclass (Web Series)
overview: A middle class family is thrown into chaos when the youngest daughter expresses her desire to go abroad, secrets and resentment hiding inside the exterior threatens to destroy the family from the inside.
